_comment: Verified license/author/name corrections, keyed by modId. These BEAT both the jar's mods.toml and the Modrinth listing because each was checked against the project's actual LICENSE file (or, for authors, the source repo). 'note' becomes a footnote in the README. Re-verify before changing. Audited 2026-06-05.

create.note: Source-available: code is MIT, art/assets are All Rights Reserved. The jar's bare 'MIT' only covers the code.

another_furniture.note: Split license: code MIT, art assets All Rights Reserved (Starfish Studios). The jar's 'MIT' only covers the code.

bettercombat.note: The source LICENSE file is GPL-3.0 and the jar agrees; the Modrinth listing's 'All Rights Reserved' is stale.

bountiful.note: The source LICENSE file is GPL-3.0 (not LGPL as the Modrinth listing shows).

valkyrienskies.note: Core mod is LGPL-3.0; the jar's 'Apache-2.0' is the separately-licensed addon API module.

villagersplus.note: The source LICENSE file is GPL-3.0; the jar metadata mislabels it CC0.

kubejsadditions.note: The source LICENSE file states All Rights Reserved; the Modrinth listing mislabels it MIT.

pipeorgans.note: The source LICENSE file is MIT; the jar metadata mislabels it All Rights Reserved.

createdeco.note: The source LICENSE file is CC0-1.0; the jar metadata is a placeholder ('Insert License Here').

polylib.note: From the source LICENSE; the jar metadata is a placeholder ('Insert License Here').

create_central_kitchen.note: The source LICENSE file is LGPL-3.0; the jar mislabels it MIT.

create_enchantment_industry.note: The source LICENSE file is LGPL-3.0; the jar mislabels it MIT.

kambrik.note: Author from the source repo; the jar lists the author as the placeholder 'Me!'.

kotlinforforge.note: No Forge mods.toml in the jar; license and author taken from the source repo.

u58R1TMW.note: No Forge mods.toml in the jar (loader shim), so its modId reads blank; keyed by Modrinth project id u58R1TMW. License from the source repo.

vs_clockwork.note: Author list from the project page; the jar leaves the authors field blank.

tinkers_things.note: Author from the project page; the jar leaves the authors field blank.

resourcefulconfig.note: Author from the project page; the jar leaves the authors field blank.

create_jetpack.note: Custom source-available license; the jar stores the license as a bare URL.

amendments.note: Source-available with redistribution restrictions; see the project page.

supplementaries.note: Source-available with redistribution restrictions; see the project page.

suppsquared.note: Source-available with redistribution restrictions; see the project page.

everycomp.note: Source-available with redistribution restrictions; see the project page.

sawmill.note: Source-available with redistribution restrictions; see the project page.
